commitments.text: These institutional arrangements and funding such as the Korea Climate Action Fund will prevent the vulnerable populations from being disproportionately affected in the process of the transition.

Efforts to develop and distribute climate change adaptation manuals are also underway to ensure that the public entities in possession and management of climate-vulnerable facilities are equipped with the necessary knowledge and skills to establish and implement their own adaptation plans.
Public entities in possession and management of climate-vulnerable facilities are required to establish and implement their own adaptation plans.

measurability.reason: No specific numbers, units, target years, or baselines are mentioned in the commitments.

gap_findings.description: South Korea's NDC lacks a specific commitment on adaptation finance.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: adaptation finance gaps persist; developing countries need significantly more than current flows.

gap_findings.description: South Korea's NDC commitments on adaptation finance are vague and lack quantification.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: These institutional arrangements and funding such as the Korea Climate Action Fund will prevent the vulnerable populations from being disproportionately affected in the process of the transition.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: adaptation finance gaps persist; developing countries need significantly more than current flows.

gap_findings.description: South Korea's NDC does not specify a target for adaptation finance, which is inconsistent with the IPCC's recommendation for significantly more finance for developing countries.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: adaptation finance gaps persist; developing countries need significantly more than current flows.

gap_findings.description: South Korea's NDC does not specify any conditional dependencies for its adaptation finance commitments.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: adaptation finance gaps persist; developing countries need significantly more than current flows.

details.summary: South Korea's NDC lacks specific commitments on adaptation finance, and its existing commitments are vague and lack quantification.

pass_c.country_summary: South Korea's NDC lacks specific commitments on adaptation finance, and its existing commitments are vague and lack quantification.
pass_c.policy_recommendation: South Korea should establish specific, measurable, and ambitious commitments on adaptation finance, aligned with the IPCC's recommendations, and consider conditional dependencies to ensure delivery.
